content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: November 10, 1983
No.: M-83-261

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Janis Shank McLean

Subject: Governor's Office/Transportation

The Governor received private airplane transportation from a corporation to attend a Police Officer's Association meeting in Los Angeles. The State paid the corporation $100, which is the value of a commercial, first class ticket.

The Governor has no reporting responsibility. The transportation's value, under Stone, is the commercial value and this was paid.

JSM:nrw
